sentences.arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «مَنْ سَلَكَ طَرِيقًا يَلْتَمِسُ فِيهِ عِلْمًا، سَهَّلَ اللَّهُ لَهُ بِهِ طَرِيقًا إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ» [رَوَاهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الذِّكْرِ وَالدُّعَاءِ، رَقْمُ ٢٦٩٩].
sentences.translation: Allahov Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: „Ko krene putem tražeći na njemu nauku, Allah će mu olakšati put do Dženneta“ [Muslim, Knjiga o zikru i dovi, br. 2699].
sentences.translationEn: The Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him) said: 'Whoever follows a path seeking knowledge, Allah will make easy for him a path to Paradise' [Muslim, Book of Dhikr and Supplication, No. 2699].

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْحَدِيثُ يَحُثُّ الْمُسْلِمِينَ عَلَى الِاجْتِهَادِ فِي طَلَبِ الْعِلْمِ الشَّرْعِيِّ الْمَبْنِيِّ عَلَى الْكِتَابِ وَالسُّنَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj hadis podstiče muslimane na trud u sticanju šerijatskog znanja utemeljenog na Knjizi i Sunnetu.
sentences.translationEn: This hadith urges Muslims to strive in seeking Sharia knowledge based on the Book and the Sunnah.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ الشَّيْخُ الْأَلْبَانِيُّ إِنَّ الْعِلْمَ النَّافِعَ هُوَ مَا أَوْرَثَ الْخَشْيَةَ لِلَّهِ وَأَدَّى إِلَى الْعَمَلِ الصَّالِحِ.
sentences.translation: Šejh al-Albani kaže da je korisno znanje ono koje rađa strahopoštovanje prema Allahu i vodi ka dobrim djelima.
sentences.translationEn: Sheikh al-Albani says that beneficial knowledge is that which inherits the fear of Allah and leads to righteous deeds.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَنْبَغِي لِطَالِبِ الْعِلْمِ أَنْ يَتَكَبَّرَ عَلَى النَّاسِ، بَلْ عَلَيْهِ أَنْ يَكُونَ مِثَالًا فِي التَّوَاضُعِ وَالْأَدَبِ.
sentences.translation: Tragač za znanjem ne smije biti ohol prema ljudima, već treba biti primjer poniznosti i lijepog ponašanja.
sentences.translationEn: A seeker of knowledge should not be arrogant toward people; rather, he should be an example of humility and manners.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ طَرِيقَ الْعِلْمِ شَاقٌّ وَلَكِنَّ عَاقِبَتَهُ حَمِيدَةٌ، حَيْثُ تَدْعُو الْمَلَائِكَةُ لِطَالِبِ الْعِلْمِ رِضًا بِمَا يَصْنَعُ.
sentences.translation: Put znanja je težak, ali je njegov kraj pohvalan, jer meleki mole za onoga ko traži znanje iz zadovoljstva onim što on čini.
sentences.translationEn: The path of knowledge is arduous, but its outcome is praised, as the angels pray for the seeker of knowledge out of pleasure with what he does.

sentences.arabic: فَالْجَهْلُ دَاءٌ، وَدَوَاؤُهُ هُوَ الْبَحْثُ عَنِ الْحَقِيقَةِ وَالتَّفَقُّهُ فِي أَحْكَامِ الدِّينِ.
sentences.translation: Neznanje je bolest, a lijek za nju je traženje istine i podučavanje o vjerskim propisima.
sentences.translationEn: Ignorance is a disease, and its medicine is searching for the truth and understanding the rulings of the religion.
